// aima game starter: VS Code drives the build via CMakePresets.json + the vcpkg toolchain. The runnable project is the repo root (aima_game), so point CMake Tools at the workspace folder; it then offers the windows-debug / mac-arm64-debug / linux-x64-debug presets in the status bar.
//: VCPKG_ROOT must be set in your environment (tools/setup-* persists it). The presets read $env{VCPKG_ROOT} to find the vcpkg toolchain file.
